titleStmt.title: SII 7.378: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 378. (A.R. No. 173 of 1901). ON THE THIRD SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē .
trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śakavaru
ṣa 1353 saṁdu nālkaneya vartamānada virōdhikrutusaṁvatsarada māgha ba 10 parvvadaṁ
du sōmavāradallū śrīmā(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja paramēsvara Arirāyavibhāḍa catu
ssamudrādhipati śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyaru perumāḷedēvadaṇāyakaru vija
yanagariya nelevīḍinaliddu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁda rājyaṁgeyiva kāladalū Ā rāyaru
daṁṇāyakara nirūpadiṁ bārakūrarājyavanū caṁḍarasavoḍeyarū pālisuva kāla
dali paṁcama kōṭa haṁpaṁṇēśvararumappa hoyisaṇa ḍe hiriyaṁṇoḍiya
[Ela]ppanāyakana maga mallappanāyakanū kōṭiyakēriya mārkaṁḍēśvaradēvarali sivarātrepu
(ṁ)ṇyakāladalli dharmmava māḍi dāreya neṟadu barisida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare vobbabrā
hmaṇage rudrapūjeyāgi nityānika Ācaṁdrārkavāgi naḍavadakke brahmūra guṁmarikōṭinavoḷa
gaṇa bāḷu Ā bāḷa cetussīmeya vivara mūḍalu raṁgaṁṇabhaṭṭara jīvadhana naḍava vōṇiyi
ṁdaṁ paḍuvala teṁkalu viṣṇubhagava mādhavabhagavana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
jīvadana naḍava vōṇiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu viṣṇubhagavana ṭhakkuraṇa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yiṁtī catussīmeyavoḷaguḷa bāḷu nāghaṁḍugadalū mūḍe Ayidu bittuva bede bhūvi
Ālli yidda teṁginamaragaḷu sahitavellā bhūmiyanū nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa siddhasādhya Aṣṭa
bhōgatējasvā(ṁ)mya sahitavaha bhūmiyanu Ārtthaparitsēdavāgi koṁḍu mūlaparitsēdavāgi
strīputragñātisāmaṁtadāyādānumatadiṁda krayadhārāpūrvakavāgi yicaṁṇaUpādhyā
ra makkaḷu caṁdeṁṇagaḷa kayyali dhāṟeya neṟasikoṁḍu dēvarige dhāṟeye neṟada yi bāḷiṁge
dēvasva brahmūravoḷagaṇa Uḷūrasvāmidēvarige Ā dēvara hāneyali Ā dēvara mūḍekaṭṭa
ḷeyalli hadinayidu mūḍe bhatta naḍadubahudu yi bhattava tettu suddhavāgi dharmmakke naḍava gē
ṇi Ākki hāne 40 ra lekkada mūḍe 10 mūḍe gēṇiya Akkiya kālakālakke tappade naḍadu bahu
du yi bāḷige Āda hoṇe caṁdappagaḷa makkaḷu raṁgaṁṇabhaṭṭaru yiṁtappudakke sākṣigaḷu mā
dhavabhaṭṭara maga puṭṭaṁṇagaḷu haṁpaṇnasēnabōvara maga lakhaṁṇasēnabōvaru balleyaseṭṭiya māṇi
paṭṭa Areseṭṭiya Aḷiya talāṇaseṭṭi yiṁtī mallappanāyka māḍida rudrapūjeya dharmma
Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍavadakke baradu naṭṭa śilāsāsanakke . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dānapāḷanayō
dānārcayē yōnupālanu . dānāta svargamāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ pa
śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 7.378 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
